entities.description: A geographic location where pearl millet is cultivated

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to determine the complete DNA sequence of the reference genotype Tift 23D2B1-P1-P5

entities.name: TIFT 23D2B1-P1-P5
entities.description: The reference genotype of pearl millet used for whole genome sequencing

entities.name: WAX BIOSYNTHESIS GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in the production of wax, enriched in the pearl millet genome and linked to environmental tolerance

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to withstand high temperature conditions

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to withstand water-deficient conditions

entities.name: RESEQUENCING
entities.description: The method of sequencing multiple lines of pearl millet to analyze genetic variation

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within the pearl millet population

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of pearl millet lines

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process by which pearl millet was adapted for human use

entities.name: MARKER TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The statistical links between genetic markers and specific agronomic traits

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that uses marker trait associations to predict and improve crop performance

entities.name: HETEROTIC POOLS
entities.description: Groups of genetically diverse lines used to maximize the performance of hybrid offspring

entities.name: HYBRID PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The agronomic output and quality of hybrid pearl millet varieties
